home.title: DreamTeams
home.description: Hackathon aggregator and team formation platform. Find hackathons, build teams, compete in events.

aggregator.title: Event Aggregator
aggregator.description: All hackathons in one place — no need to search across dozens of websites. Smart filters by date, topic, and format

teams.title: Team Formation

organizers.title: For Organizers
